title: Example 6-15 variable stress block damage using Miner rule and Gerber equivalent reversed stress

notes: This file follows Example 6-15 on p331-p332.
The stress block cycles are entered explicitly rather than inferred from the figure, so the input JSON remains the source of truth.
Figure 6-18 provides the fatigue strength fraction f from Sut.
Table 6-7 provides the Gerber first-quadrant relation used to determine whether a sub-cycle causes finite life.
Miner damage is accumulated as D = sum(n_i / N_i) with c = 1 by default.
